channel.title: Aws on Mike Ball
channel.description: Recent content in Aws on Mike Ball

item.title: Scalable Terraform patterns: compound workspace names
item.description: My overview of the Terraform compound workspace name pattern.

item.title: Unit Testing AWS S3 Downloads in Go
item.description: How can a function wrapping the aws-sdk-go be unit tested using a local directory serving as a mock AWS S3 bucket?

item.title: Mocking aws-sdk With Jest
item.description: How can the aws-sdk be mocked using jest?

item.title: Lobber
item.description:
Lobber is a simple command line utility used to quickly upload a directory to Amazon S3.

Lobber is built with Ruby and can be downloaded from Rubygems.

View its source code on GitHub »
